test.note: Initial run failed due to pre-existing TestConvertFileMatchesReferenceStructureIgnoringImages (anchor name format mismatch). Fixed by adding navTypeToSymbolID() in yj_to_epub_navigation.go. All tests pass after fix.

lint.note: Project uses go vet as lint

appliedUpdates.description: Created audit-yj-to-epub-navigation-findings.md already exists from prior audit. No new library entries needed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note to YJ Symbol Catalog section: when generating anchor names or other wire-format identifiers that must match Calibre output exactly, use the original $N symbol ID format instead of human-readable names. The navTypeToSymbolID() function in yj_to_epub_navigation.go is the example pattern.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: TestConvertFileMatchesReferenceStructureIgnoringImages failed after the $N→real-name conversion because anchor names like '$798_0_Chapter' became 'headings_0_Chapter'. The fix required adding navTypeToSymbolID() to map back to $N format for anchor name generation only.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document replace_ion_data → mergeIonReferencedStringSymbols design rationale in library
rejectedObservations.reason: Useful knowledge but highly specific to this one function pair. The design difference is already implicitly documented in the function mapping comment in yj_to_epub.go. Adding a library entry for every function's design rationale would create excessive documentation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document the mismatch between 15 Python functions and 11 Go functions (6 Go-specific)
rejectedObservations.reason: Already clearly documented in the function mapping header comment in yj_to_epub.go. The mapping is comprehensive and explicit.
